SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.descriptor

Class EntityAttributeImpl

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.descriptor.EntityAttributeImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
EntityAttribute
Direct Known Subclasses:
RelAttributeImpl
public class EntityAttributeImpl extends Object implements EntityAttribute
Platform provided implementation of EntityAttribute class.
Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda

  • Method Details

    • init

      private void init(Field field)

    • name

      public final String name()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Return the name of the entity attribute.
      Specified by:
      name in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      String

    • datatype

      public final Class<?> datatype()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Return the java type of the attribute.
      Specified by:
      datatype in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      Class

    • column

      public final String column()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Return the name of the table column this attribute is associated with. The attribute will be annotated with Column to represent the underlying table column it is associated to. If no such annotation is present and the attribute/field is not marked as Transient, then the name of the field will be treated as the column name.
      Specified by:
      column in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      String

    • isId

      public final boolean isId()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Indicates whether this attribute is an id column. An attribute will be an id column, if it has the annotation Id.
      Specified by:
      isId in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      boolean

    • isAutoGenerated

      public boolean isAutoGenerated()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Indicate whether the value of the id attribute(s) will be auto generated by the database provider.
      Specified by:
      isAutoGenerated in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      boolean

    • generationType

      public jakarta.persistence.GenerationType generationType()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Return the auto generated type.
      Specified by:
      generationType in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      GenerationType

    • isVersion

      public final boolean isVersion()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Indicates whether this attribute is an versionable column. An attribute will be an id column, if it has the annotation Version. A version column is primarily a numeric column, where it will be auto-incremented every time the entry changes. It will be injected automatically by the framework.
      Specified by:
      isVersion in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      boolean

    • isEnum

      public final boolean isEnum()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Indicate if the attribute is an Enum type. JPA LiTE supports handling enum data type. A java enum type will be translated either into a String or an Integer depending on the option chosen while modelling the Entity class.
      Specified by:
      isEnum in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      boolean

    • enumType

      public final jakarta.persistence.EnumType enumType()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Return the enumerated type.
      Specified by:
      enumType in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      EnumType

    • isTransient

      public final boolean isTransient()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Indicates whether this entity attribute is of transient type. A Transient attribute will never be persisted. Hence while generating the insert query, this attribute will be skipped.
      Specified by:
      isTransient in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      boolean

    • updatable

      public boolean updatable()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Verify if this column is updatable. Any updatable column would be skipped during a database update operation.
      Specified by:
      updatable in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      boolean

    • nullable

      public boolean nullable()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Verify if this column is nullable.
      Specified by:
      nullable in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      boolean

      public String check()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Return the check constraint of this column.
      Specified by:
      check in interface EntityAttribute
      Returns:
      String

    • length

      public int length()
      Description copied from interface: EntityAttribute
      Return the column length.
      Specified by:
      length in interface EntityAttribute
